evals.prompt: 我要开始做一个新需求，先帮我看一下 git 状态。
evals.expected_output: 识别为新任务开始前的 pre-edit base gate；检查当前 git 状态和分支；识别主分支；fetch 最新远端主分支作为基线；如果工作树干净且没有明确要求继续当前分支，则从最新远端基线创建或更新任务分支后再允许编辑；遇到未提交改动时不丢弃、不覆盖，并报告 dirty-work 保护、prework_base、prework_branch 和 prework_decision 状态。
expectations: The run treats the prompt as the start-of-work git workflow
The run performs the pre-edit base gate before any file edits
The run fetches or checks the primary branch baseline
The run starts from the fetched baseline when the worktree is clean and the user did not opt into the current branch
The run does not discard, overwrite, or stage unrelated dirty files

evals.prompt: 我们刚刚讨论完方案，现在直接帮我实现。
evals.expected_output: 即使前面是设计讨论，也识别为开始编辑文件前的新任务；先执行 pre-edit base gate：检查分支和 dirty work、fetch origin/main；如果处在 detached HEAD，先创建 codex/ 前缀任务分支；如果当前分支落后且工作树干净，先 rebase 到最新主分支；如果 dirty work 阻塞，则停止说明 blocker，不能先改文件。
expectations: The run does not skip git-delivery just because the request followed a planning discussion
The run creates or fixes a task branch before editing when HEAD is detached
The run rebases a clean behind branch before editing when safe
The run stops before editing if dirty work blocks base sync

evals.prompt: 帮我准备一个新分支来改登录 bug。
evals.expected_output: 识别用户明确要求准备新分支；先检查 git status、识别主分支并 fetch 远端基线；在安全时从最新远端基线创建描述性任务分支；如果未提交改动会阻塞安全创建，则停止并询问如何处理。
expectations: The run honors the user's explicit request to prepare a new task branch
The run fetches or checks the primary branch baseline before creating the branch
The run does not discard or overwrite dirty work when creating the branch

evals.prompt: 就在当前分支继续，不要切分支。我想改一下登录 bug。
evals.expected_output: 识别用户明确要求继续当前分支，因此不切主分支、不新建分支；仍检查 git status、fetch 主分支基线，并说明会留在当前分支工作。
expectations: The run honors the user's explicit instruction to continue on the current branch
The run fetches or checks the primary branch baseline without moving the worktree
The run does not create or switch branches when the user opted out

evals.prompt: 我这边还有另一个需求没做完，帮我开个并行的新需求环境。
evals.expected_output: 识别为并行开发场景；检查 git 状态和主分支基线；优先建议或创建单独 worktree/明确的新分支，而不是把当前 worktree 从活跃需求上切走；如本地改动阻塞则停止询问。
expectations: The run treats the prompt as parallel work setup
The run prefers a separate worktree or explicit new branch for parallel work
The run does not move the current worktree away from an active task without user intent

evals.expected_output: 将请求识别为 finish-work delivery；先检查 git status，运行 repo-memory 和相关验证；只 stage 意图内文件；提交后 fetch 目标合入分支并检查是否有冲突；需要时安全 rebase 并重新验证；push，并用仓库常用工具创建 PR；PR 描述包含问题、方案和验证。
expectations: The run treats the prompt as commit/push/PR delivery
The run invokes or accounts for repo-memory before committing
Relevant verification runs before commit or the blocker is stated
The run pauses any previous CI polling automation for the same PR or branch before creating a new commit
Only intended files are staged and unrelated dirty files are left out
The run checks the branch against the target merge branch before push or PR
The run rebases onto the target branch when safe, or reports exact conflict files and blocker
A PR is created, or an exact blocker is reported

evals.expected_output: 按照 the user 的默认交付约定，将“提交吧”识别为完整 delivery intent，而不是 commit-only；运行 repo-memory、验证、暂停旧 CI 轮询、只 stage 意图内文件并提交；随后检查目标主分支、必要时安全 rebase 并重新验证；push 当前分支；创建或更新 PR；不要反问是否需要 push 或 PR，除非遇到具体 blocker。
expectations: The run treats bare Chinese submit phrasing as full delivery
The run invokes or accounts for repo-memory and verification before committing
The run does not stop after creating a local commit
The run pushes the branch after committing
The run creates or updates a PR, or reports an exact blocker
The run does not ask whether to push or open a PR after this clear delivery intent

evals.prompt: 功能已经改完，测试也过了。
evals.expected_output: 识别为任务完成但还没有明确 delivery intent；如果当前任务留下本地改动且用户没有说不要提交，应在最终交付前主动询问“要我现在提交、push 并开 PR 吗？”；不能未经确认直接 commit、push 或开 PR；如果用户确认，则继续完整 Finish Work delivery path；如果用户拒绝，则保留改动未提交并报告验证和本地变更状态。
expectations: The run asks for submit/push/PR confirmation after completed work with local changes
The run does not silently commit, push, or create a PR without confirmation
The run proceeds through the full delivery path if the user confirms
The run leaves changes uncommitted and reports local status if the user declines

evals.prompt: 只改代码，先别提交，也不要 push 或开 PR。
evals.expected_output: 识别用户明确 opt out delivery；不要 commit、不要 push、不要开 PR；继续保护本地改动和无关文件；如果已经完成修改，则最终只报告验证结果和未提交的本地变更状态。
expectations: The run treats the prompt as an explicit delivery opt-out, not commit-only delivery
The run does not commit when the user said not to submit
The run does not push or create a PR when the user explicitly opted out
The run leaves local changes uncommitted and reports status
The run still protects unrelated dirty files

evals.prompt: 这个 PR 我又修了一点，帮我提交并更新一下。
evals.expected_output: 识别为已有 PR 分支上的新 commit 交付；在 commit 前查找并暂停同一 PR、分支或当前线程里已有的 CI follow-up automation；如果找到则报告 ci_poll_pause=paused 和 automation id；如果没有则报告 not_needed；然后再执行 repo-memory、验证、stage、commit、base check、push，并为新的 head commit 创建或恢复新的 CI follow-up。
expectations: The run treats follow-up PR fixes as delivery work
The run pauses stale CI polling before creating a new commit
The run reports the CI polling pause outcome
The run pushes the follow-up commit and creates or resumes CI follow-up for the new head

evals.prompt: 这个 PR 好像跟 main 有冲突，帮我处理一下。
evals.expected_output: 识别为 base branch conflict check；fetch main，检查冲突文件；如果意图明确就 rebase 到 origin/main 并解决冲突，继续 rebase、重新跑验证并 force-with-lease 推送；如果冲突不明确，就停止并报告冲突文件和需要用户判断的地方。
expectations: The run treats the prompt as a base branch conflict or rebase workflow
The run fetches or checks the target merge branch before resolving
The run prefers rebase onto the target branch for a clean task branch
The run resolves only clear conflicts and otherwise reports exact conflict files
The run reruns verification after a successful rebase before pushing

evals.prompt: PR 开好了，帮我盯一下 CI，如果挂了，能明确修的话就直接修完提交。
evals.expected_output: 只有在 delivery commit 已创建、push 成功并存在 PR/新 head 后，才开始 CI 查询；不能先创建 CI 查询任务再 commit/push。需要 GitHub CLI 时先查 PATH 里的 gh，找不到再试 /opt/homebrew/bin/gh 等常见安装路径，不能因为 PATH 缺失就直接判定 gh 不可用。先做即时 CI 检查：push/PR 后等约 10 秒查一次 PR/check run 状态；如果能看到 workflow、job、step、状态或历史耗时，就报告当前进度并粗略估算剩余时间；随后优先使用轻量会话内轮询或 provider watch 命令，active PR CI 约 1 分钟查一次，而不是默认创建 automation 或使用 15 分钟级延迟；只有当前 session 无法合理继续盯、或用户要求稍后提醒/续跑时，才创建临时 follow-up automation/reminder；轮询任务必须是临时的，CI passed、失败但不明确、blocked、cancelled 或需要用户决策时要报告终态并停止轮询，若创建过 automation 则暂停/删除，不能一直跑；CI 失败时先检查失败 job、step 和日志；如果是明确、低风险的 lint、format、typecheck、单测、snapshot、lockfile 或明显兼容性问题，就自动修复、运行相关验证、提交并推送，然后报告失败原因、修复内容、验证命令、修复 commit 和 push 状态。
expectations: The run starts CI follow-up only after commit, push, and PR or new head exist
The run tries common GitHub CLI fallback paths such as /opt/homebrew/bin/gh before reporting gh unavailable
The run plans an immediate first CI check about 10 seconds after push or PR creation
The run prefers lightweight in-session polling or a provider watch command over default automation
The run uses a short active polling interval such as 1 minute instead of a 15 minute default for fresh PR CI
The run creates temporary automation or a reminder only when the session cannot reasonably keep watching or the user asks for later follow-up
The run plans to stop polling once CI reaches a terminal state and pause or delete any temporary automation that was created
The run reports visible CI workflow/job/step status and gives a rough ETA when possible
The run inspects failing CI jobs, steps, and logs before deciding what to do
The run automatically repairs clear low-risk CI failures without asking for extra approval
The run verifies, commits, and pushes automatic CI repairs
The run reports the CI failure, repair commit, verification, and push status

evals.prompt: CI 挂了。日志看起来可能是测试期望不对，也可能是接口行为要改，你自己判断一下吧。
evals.expected_output: 识别为模棱两可的 CI 修复场景；读取失败 job 和日志后，不应自行选择一个会改变行为或测试期望的方案；需要停止并向用户说明 blocker、相关文件、可选方案以及需要用户决策的问题。
expectations: The run treats the CI failure as ambiguous after inspecting the failure context
The run does not guess between changing product behavior and changing test expectations
The run stops and asks the user for a concrete decision
The run reports the failing job or step, relevant files, blocker, and plausible options

evals.prompt: 我准备改一个 skill，先检查一下分支和本地改动，别影响其他文件。
evals.expected_output: 识别为编辑 agent asset 前的新任务准备；触发 git-delivery 的 pre-edit base gate；检查当前分支、dirty work 和远端主分支基线；如果工作树干净且没有明确要求继续当前分支，则从最新基线创建或更新任务分支；明确保护无关本地改动。
expectations: The run treats agent asset edits as a coding or asset task that needs the start-of-work git workflow
The run performs the pre-edit base gate before modifying skill files
The run checks dirty work and protects unrelated files
The run checks or fetches the primary branch baseline
